backstory.original: Volothamp "Volo" Geddarm is a flamboyant world traveler, self-proclaimed expert, and author of such works as Volo's Guide to Monsters. Known for his bombastic personality and flair for storytelling, Volo has a knack for turning facts into tall tales. Though he's quick to avoid personal danger, he's fiercely loyal to his friends - just don't expect him to cover the tab.
backstory.display: “瓦罗”瓦罗谭普·哲达是一位风度翩翩的世界旅行家、自封的专家，以及《瓦罗的怪物指南》等作品的作者。他以夸张的个性和讲故事的天赋而闻名，瓦罗擅长将事实变成离奇的故事。尽管他总是考虑自身面临的风险，但他对朋友非常忠诚——只是别指望他会付账。

description.original: Volo writes a scathing note, dealing a deep magical cut to the nearest enemy.
description.display: 瓦罗写了一个用词严厉的字条，给最近的敌人造成了深深的魔法创伤。

description.original: Volo causes his buffed allies to deal additional BUD-based damage for 15 seconds.
description.display: 瓦罗使他的增益型盟友造成额外的基础杀招伤害，持续 15 秒。

longDescription.original: Volo takes out a book and quill and writes for 15 seconds, causing his buffed allies to deal additional BUD-based damage for the duration.
longDescription.display: 瓦罗拿出一本书，用羽毛笔写了 15 秒钟，使他的增益型盟友在持续期间造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

name.original: Volo's Guide to the Sword Coast

description.desc: Volo can be used in any Grand Tour of the Sword Coast campaign adventure or variant, even if he would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
瓦罗可用于任何剑湾之旅战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。
Volo increases the damage of all Champions in the two columns in front of him by $amount%.
瓦罗会使他前面两列所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Volo increases the damage of Champions in the two columns in front of him. Place him behind your damage dealers.
tipText.display: 瓦罗会提高他前面两列勇士的伤害。将他放置在你的伤害输出身后。

description.desc: Volo increases the effect of Volo's Guide to Combat by $amount% for each Guide and/or Collection Quest completed, stacking multiplicatively.
瓦罗每完成一次指南和/或收集任务，“瓦罗的战斗指南”效果增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Volo gets more effective based on the number of guide and/or collection quests you've completed. Complete more quests to power him up!
tipText.display: 瓦罗的效果会随着你完成的指南任务和/或收集任务的数量增加而增加。完成更多的任务来强化他！

description.pre: Volo counts each type of enemy encountered in the current adventure. Volo increases the effect of Volo's Guide to Combat by $amount% for each enemy type encountered, stacking multiplicatively.
瓦罗会计算当前冒险中遇到的每一种敌人。每遇到一种敌人，瓦罗就会使“瓦罗的战斗指南”的效果增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.desc: Unlocks Volo's Guide to Writing Wrongs Ultimate Attack
解锁瓦罗的错误写作指南杀招

description.pre: If a Champion in the column in front of Volo is defeated, the formation immediately retreats to the previous area. Upon returning to the area of their near defeat, the effect of Volo's Guide to Combat is increased by $amount___2% in that area.
如果处于瓦罗前列的勇士被击败，阵型将立即撤退到上一个的区域。当回到他们近乎失败的区域时，“瓦罗的战斗指南”效果在该区域增加 $amount___2%。

name.original: Volo's Guide to Spirits and Specters
name.display: 瓦罗的鬼魂与幽灵指南

description.desc: Volo gains the Hunter role and Undead become his Favored Foe. The effect of Volo's Guide to Combat is increased by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with the Hunter role, stacking multiplicatively.
瓦罗获得了猎人角色，亡灵成为了他的偏好对手。阵型中每有一位猎人角色勇士，均使“瓦罗的战斗指南”效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationName.original: Volo's Guide to Spirits and Specters
specializationName.display: 瓦罗的鬼魂与幽灵指南

specializationDescription.original: Volo writes his manuscript on fighting undead while consulting with other Champions hunting their favored foes.
specializationDescription.display: 瓦罗在与其他勇士讨论如何对抗他们各自偏好的敌人时，撰写了关于对抗亡灵的手稿。

description.desc: The effect of Volo's Guide to Combat is increased by $amount% for each Ceremorphosis stack the formation has, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每堆叠一层蜕变，均使“瓦罗的战斗指南”效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Volo carefully studies the formation's Ceremorphosis-infected population, enhancing his own abilities.
specializationDescription.display: 瓦罗仔细研究了阵型中受蜕变影响的人群，从而增强自己的技能。

name.original: Volo's Guide to All Things Magical

description.desc: The effect of Volo's Guide to Combat is increased by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a Magic base attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位魔法基本攻击的勇士，均使“瓦罗的战斗指南”效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationName.original: Volo's Guide to All Things Magical

specializationDescription.original: Volo works with his fellow "wizards" and other magically inclined Champions.
specializationDescription.display: 瓦罗与他的“法师”同伴以及其他擅长魔法的勇士一起工作。

description.original: I am the very model of altruism, my friend! What I do, I do for us all.
description.display: 我就是利他主义的典范，我的朋友！我所做的一切，都是为了我们所有人。

description.original: My very presence provides a certain sense of sudden capability!
description.display: 我的存在本身就能让人瞬间充满力量！

description.original: The trick is to keep hitting them until they can no longer hit you back.
description.display: 诀窍就是不断地攻击他们，直到他们再也无法还手为止。

description.original: That one's trousers have a loose thread. A keen observation, yes?
description.display: 那家伙的裤子上有一根松动的线头。眼光很敏锐，对吧？

description.original: I've had an epiphany! If I raise my voice, more willing ears might hear me!
description.display: 我顿悟了！如果我提高嗓门，或许会有更多愿意倾听的人听到我！

effects.description: Increases the number of columns buffed by Volo's Guide to Combat by +1.

description.original: Expand your horizons, bolster your ranks, seek gainful employment...
description.display: 开拓视野，壮大队伍，谋求高薪……

description.original: Amass a menagerie of helpful creatures, forge the finest arms...
description.display: 搜罗一群有用的生物，打造最精良的武器……

description.original: And, finally, be sure to boast of your achievements for all the world to see!
description.display: 最后，一定要向全世界炫耀你的成就！

description.original: The origins of the fearsome owlbear are a subject of debate among scholars.
description.display: 关于可怕的枭熊的起源，学者们一直存在争议。

description.original: In truth, owlbears are neither natural nor the result of magic gone awry.
description.display: 事实上，枭熊既不是自然产生的，也不是魔法失控的结果。

description.original: I believe a swift, strategic withdrawal is in order. No time to dilly-dally!
description.display: 我相信，迅速而有策略地撤退是明智之举。没有时间磨磨蹭蹭了！

description.original: No matter the circumstances, the estimable Volo remains ready!
description.display: 无论环境如何，可敬的瓦罗始终准备就绪！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Behold my physique! Yes, I do maintain a regiment of calisthenics.
description.display: 瞧瞧我的体格！是的，我确实在坚持做一套体操训练。

description.original: I've simply the worst headache today. Bah! I'm certain it's nothing serious.
description.display: 我今天真是头疼得要命。呸！我确定没什么大碍。

description.original: You ask why Elminster is so concerned with my wellbeing? He's a true fan, of course! Why else?
description.display: 你问我为什么艾尔明斯特如此关心我的安危？当然因为他是我的忠实粉丝！不然还能为什么？

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

description.original: Why, I dare to posit that the noble owlbear is, in fact, a creation of the gods themselves!
description.display: 我敢说高贵的枭熊实际上是众神亲自创造的！

description.original: Drat. Another one. You would not believe how many of these I go through.
description.display: 该死，又一顶。你一定不会相信我有过多少顶这样的帽子了。

description.original: Not a snug fit, but it will do for some comfort during my daily ruminations.
description.display: 虽然不太合适，但在我每天沉思时，它能带来些许舒适。

description.original: Aha! An acceptable adornment. It does lend an air of refinement, doesn't it?
description.display: 啊哈！这件装饰品还可以。它增添了一丝优雅，对吧？

description.original: Finally! A crown fit for my brow. A reflection of my very soul, no doubt!
description.display: 终于找到了！一顶和我的额头相称的王冠。这无疑是我灵魂的映衬！

description.original: That dull, old thing? Why, I hardly recognize it. Perhaps it may open letters?
description.display: 那无聊的旧玩意？我几乎都认不出它来了。它或许能用来拆信吧？

description.original: An elegant edge, to be sure. One I hope to never find cause to use!
description.display: 这确实是一把优雅的利刃。但我希望永远不会有要用它的理由！

description.original: More for show than anything, but it does help to keep the ruffians at bay.
description.display: 更多是用来展示的，但确实能吓退流氓恶棍。

description.original: Scoff if you must, but I dare say I hold in my hand the mightiest of blades!
description.display: 你要笑就笑吧，但我敢说，我手里握着最厉害的剑！

description.original: A far cry from the genuine article, but he is a handsome devil, is he not?
description.display: 与真品相去甚远，但他是个帅气的魔鬼，对吧？

description.original: Once stolen, but later returned. There is, perhaps, some honor among thieves.
description.display: 这画曾经被偷走过，但又被还了回来。或许，小偷也是有荣誉感的。

description.original: Shall I tell you of a remarkable and historic property in Waterdeep?
description.display: 我是否要告诉你位于深水城的一处非凡且历史悠久的房产？

description.original: Take this. A far superior relic than that old jelly you were chained to.
description.display: 这个你拿着。这是一件比你曾拴着的原先那只眼睛好得多的圣物。

name.display: 瓦罗写到一半不写的草稿

description.original: Was this a treatise on goblin poetry, a recipe book, or a sordid romance novel?
description.display: 这是有关地精诗歌的论文，食谱，还是龌蹉的言情小说？

description.original: You have in your hands the foremost and most up-to-date guide to the city.
description.display: 你手里拿着的是这座城市最好最新的指南。

description.original: No matter your destination, Volothamp Geddarm shall be your humble guide!
description.display: 不管你的目的地是哪里，瓦罗谭普·哲达都是你谦卑的向导！

description.original: Would you believe a particularly artistic hydra created this incredible cover?
description.display: 你能相信吗？这令人叹为观止的封面是一条极具艺术天赋的多头蛇蜥创作的。

description.original: Even the Sage of Shadowdale falls prey to a lack of imagination, it would seem.
description.display: 看来，就连阴影谷的贤者也难逃想象力匮乏的困扰。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

name.original: Volo's Guide to All Things Magical

description.original: My editor provided a revision for Candlekeep, but I prefer the original.
description.display: 我的编辑为烛堡提供了一本修订本，但我还是更喜欢原版。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

description.original: The little blighters burrow into the brain through the ocular cavity! Ghastly...
description.display: 这些小烦人精会通过眼窝钻进大脑！太恐怖了……

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

name.original: Volo's Guide to Spirits and Spectres
name.display: 瓦罗的鬼魂与幽灵指南

description.original: My latest work, made manifest at last! Unlike its subject matter, of course.
description.display: 我的最新作品，终于呈现在世人面前了！当然了，不像这本书的主题，依然不肯现身。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

description.original: I've no interest in sullying my research with implements of inferior quality.
description.display: 我没兴趣用劣质的工具败坏我的研究。

description.original: Yes, I do believe these resources shall suffice for my general needs. For now.
description.display: 嗯，我相信这些资源足以满足我的一般需求了。至少暂时如此。

description.original: Ah, the secretion of the elusive rocktopus! A valuable asset, indeed!
description.display: 啊，神出鬼没的岩章鱼的分泌物！这的确是一件宝贝啊！

description.original: Kraken ink! I shall ensure that every drop furthers the cause of knowledge!
description.display: 海怪墨水！我得确保每一滴都用于推动知识的进步！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a CHAOTIC alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Volothamp "Volo" Geddarm is a flamboyant world traveler, self-proclaimed expert, and author of such works as Volo's Guide to Monsters. Known for his bombastic personality and flair for storytelling, Volo has a knack for turning facts into tall tales. Though he's quick to avoid personal danger, he's fiercely loyal to his friends - just don't expect him to cover the tab.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Volothamp "Volo" Geddarm is a Support Champion whose encyclopedic knowledge empowers his allies, despite his tendency to overestimate his own expertise. His buffs grow stronger as you complete more collection and guide quests, while his quick thinking ensures the party can regroup when danger strikes.

character_sheet_details.backstory: “瓦罗”瓦罗谭普·哲达是一位风度翩翩的世界旅行家、自封的专家，以及《瓦罗的怪物指南》等作品的作者。他以夸张的个性和讲故事的天赋而闻名，瓦罗擅长将事实变成离奇的故事。尽管他总是考虑自身面临的风险，但他对朋友非常忠诚——只是别指望他会付账。
character_sheet_details.system_description: “瓦罗”瓦罗谭普·哲达是一位支援型勇士，他那百科全书般的知识能够增强盟友的力量，尽管他总是高估自己的专业知识。随着你完成更多收集任务和指南任务，他的增益效果会变得更强大，而他敏捷的思维也确保了当危险来袭时，队伍能够重新集结。

original.name: Volo's Guide to Malicious Mockery
original.description: Volo writes a scathing note, dealing a deep magical cut to the nearest enemy.

display.name: 瓦罗的恶意嘲笑指南
display.description: 瓦罗写了一个用词严厉的字条，给最近的敌人造成了深深的魔法创伤。

original.long_description: Volo takes out a book and quill and writes for 15 seconds, causing his buffed allies to deal additional BUD-based damage for the duration.

display.name: 瓦罗的错误写作指南

display.long_description: 瓦罗拿出一本书，用羽毛笔写了 15 秒钟，使他的增益型盟友在持续期间造成额外的基础杀招伤害。

display.name: 瓦罗的任务指南
display.tip_text: 瓦罗的效果会随着你完成的指南任务和/或收集任务的数量增加而增加。完成更多的任务来强化他！

display.description: 我顿悟了！如果我提高嗓门，或许会有更多愿意倾听的人听到我！

display.name: 瓦罗的有用提示
display.description: 开拓视野，壮大队伍，谋求高薪……

display.name: 瓦罗的激励暗示
display.description: 搜罗一群有用的生物，打造最精良的武器……

original.name: Volo's Boundless Brilliance
original.description: And, finally, be sure to boast of your achievements for all the world to see!

display.name: 瓦罗的无尽智慧
display.description: 最后，一定要向全世界炫耀你的成就！

original.name: Volo's Grasping Guesswork
original.description: The origins of the fearsome owlbear are a subject of debate among scholars.

display.name: 瓦罗的盲目猜测
display.description: 关于可怕的枭熊的起源，学者们一直存在争议。

original.name: Volo's Fantastic Findings
original.description: In truth, owlbears are neither natural nor the result of magic gone awry.

display.name: 瓦罗的奇妙发现
display.description: 事实上，枭熊既不是自然产生的，也不是魔法失控的结果。

original.name: Volo's Justified Jaunt
original.description: I believe a swift, strategic withdrawal is in order. No time to dilly-dally!

display.name: 瓦罗的合理漫步
display.description: 我相信，迅速而有策略地撤退是明智之举。没有时间磨磨蹭蹭了！

original.name: Volo's Adaptable Approach
original.description: No matter the circumstances, the estimable Volo remains ready!

display.name: 瓦罗的随机应变
display.description: 无论环境如何，可敬的瓦罗始终准备就绪！

effects.description: 使瓦罗的专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Athlete
original.description: Behold my physique! Yes, I do maintain a regiment of calisthenics.

display.name: 运动员
display.description: 瞧瞧我的体格！是的，我确实在坚持做一套体操训练。

original.name: Illithid Tadpole
original.description: I've simply the worst headache today. Bah! I'm certain it's nothing serious.

display.name: 灵吸怪蝌蚪
display.description: 我今天真是头疼得要命。呸！我确定没什么大碍。

original.name: Unknown Power
original.description: You ask why Elminster is so concerned with my wellbeing? He's a true fan, of course! Why else?

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 未知之力
display.description: 你问我为什么艾尔明斯特如此关心我的安危？当然因为他是我的忠实粉丝！不然还能为什么？

effects.description: 使瓦罗的专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Volo's Keen Knowledge
original.description: Why, I dare to posit that the noble owlbear is, in fact, a creation of the gods themselves!

display.name: 瓦罗的渊博知识
display.description: 我敢说高贵的枭熊实际上是众神亲自创造的！

original.name: Volo's Crumpled Cap
original.description: Drat. Another one. You would not believe how many of these I go through.

display.name: 瓦罗皱巴巴的帽子
display.description: 该死，又一顶。你一定不会相信我有过多少顶这样的帽子了。

original.name: Volo's Basic Beret
original.description: Not a snug fit, but it will do for some comfort during my daily ruminations.

display.name: 瓦罗最简单的贝雷帽
display.description: 虽然不太合适，但在我每天沉思时，它能带来些许舒适。

original.name: Volo's Handsome Headpiece
original.description: Aha! An acceptable adornment. It does lend an air of refinement, doesn't it?

display.name: 瓦罗帅气的头饰
display.description: 啊哈！这件装饰品还可以。它增添了一丝优雅，对吧？

original.name: Volo's Magnificent Millinery
original.description: Finally! A crown fit for my brow. A reflection of my very soul, no doubt!

display.name: 瓦罗华丽的女帽
display.description: 终于找到了！一顶和我的额头相称的王冠。这无疑是我灵魂的映衬！

original.name: Volo's Discarded Dagger
original.description: That dull, old thing? Why, I hardly recognize it. Perhaps it may open letters?

display.name: 瓦罗丢弃的匕首
display.description: 那无聊的旧玩意？我几乎都认不出它来了。它或许能用来拆信吧？

original.name: Volo's Curvaceous Cutter
original.description: An elegant edge, to be sure. One I hope to never find cause to use!

display.name: 瓦罗的曲刃刀
display.description: 这确实是一把优雅的利刃。但我希望永远不会有要用它的理由！

original.name: Volo's Resplendent Rapier
original.description: More for show than anything, but it does help to keep the ruffians at bay.

display.name: 瓦罗华丽的西洋剑
display.description: 更多是用来展示的，但确实能吓退流氓恶棍。

original.name: Volo's Quintessential Quill
original.description: Scoff if you must, but I dare say I hold in my hand the mightiest of blades!

display.name: 瓦罗的典型羽毛笔
display.description: 你要笑就笑吧，但我敢说，我手里握着最厉害的剑！

original.name: Volo's Counterfeit Canvas
original.description: A far cry from the genuine article, but he is a handsome devil, is he not?

display.name: 瓦罗的赝品油画
display.description: 与真品相去甚远，但他是个帅气的魔鬼，对吧？

original.name: Volo's Perfect Portraiture
original.description: Once stolen, but later returned. There is, perhaps, some honor among thieves.

display.name: 瓦罗的完美肖像画
display.description: 这画曾经被偷走过，但又被还了回来。或许，小偷也是有荣誉感的。

original.name: Volo's Daring Deed
original.description: Shall I tell you of a remarkable and historic property in Waterdeep?

display.name: 瓦罗的英勇事迹
display.description: 我是否要告诉你位于深水城的一处非凡且历史悠久的房产？

original.name: Volo's Ersatz Eye
original.description: Take this. A far superior relic than that old jelly you were chained to.

display.name: 瓦罗的假眼
display.description: 这个你拿着。这是一件比你曾拴着的原先那只眼睛好得多的圣物。

original.name: Volo's Discontinued Draft
original.description: Was this a treatise on goblin poetry, a recipe book, or a sordid romance novel?

display.name: 瓦罗写到一半不写的草稿
display.description: 这是有关地精诗歌的论文，食谱，还是龌蹉的言情小说？

original.name: Volo's Waterdeep Enchiridion
original.description: You have in your hands the foremost and most up-to-date guide to the city.

display.name: 瓦罗的深水城指南
display.description: 你手里拿着的是这座城市最好最新的指南。

original.name: Volo's Multitudinous Manuals
original.description: No matter your destination, Volothamp Geddarm shall be your humble guide!

display.name: 瓦罗的众多手册
display.description: 不管你的目的地是哪里，瓦罗谭普·哲达都是你谦卑的向导！

original.name: Volo's Guide to Monsters
original.description: Would you believe a particularly artistic hydra created this incredible cover?

display.name: 瓦罗的怪物指南
display.description: 你能相信吗？这令人叹为观止的封面是一条极具艺术天赋的多头蛇蜥创作的。

original.name: Volo's Rejected Report
original.description: Even the Sage of Shadowdale falls prey to a lack of imagination, it would seem.

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 瓦罗被拒绝的报告
display.description: 看来，就连阴影谷的贤者也难逃想象力匮乏的困扰。

effects.description: 使瓦罗的专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Volo's Guide to All Things Magical
original.description: My editor provided a revision for Candlekeep, but I prefer the original.

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 瓦罗的魔法百科指南
display.description: 我的编辑为烛堡提供了一本修订本，但我还是更喜欢原版。

effects.description: 使瓦罗的专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Volo's Illithids Illustrated
original.description: The little blighters burrow into the brain through the ocular cavity! Ghastly...

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 瓦罗的灵吸怪插图
display.description: 这些小烦人精会通过眼窝钻进大脑！太恐怖了……

effects.description: 使瓦罗的专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Volo's Guide to Spirits and Spectres
original.description: My latest work, made manifest at last! Unlike its subject matter, of course.

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Volo's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 瓦罗的鬼魂与幽灵指南
display.description: 我的最新作品，终于呈现在世人面前了！当然了，不像这本书的主题，依然不肯现身。

effects.description: 使瓦罗的专精的基本效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Volo's Tawdry Tools
original.description: I've no interest in sullying my research with implements of inferior quality.

display.name: 瓦罗花哨庸俗的工具
display.description: 我没兴趣用劣质的工具败坏我的研究。

original.name: Volo's Everyday Essentials
original.description: Yes, I do believe these resources shall suffice for my general needs. For now.

display.name: 瓦罗的日常必需品
display.description: 嗯，我相信这些资源足以满足我的一般需求了。至少暂时如此。

original.name: Volo's Incredible Ink
original.description: Ah, the secretion of the elusive rocktopus! A valuable asset, indeed!

display.name: 瓦罗的神奇墨水
display.description: 啊，神出鬼没的岩章鱼的分泌物！这的确是一件宝贝啊！

original.name: Volo's Pelagic Pigment
original.description: Kraken ink! I shall ensure that every drop furthers the cause of knowledge!

display.name: 瓦罗的深海颜料
display.description: 海怪墨水！我得确保每一滴都用于推动知识的进步！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有智力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a CHAOTIC alignment
阵型中每有一位混乱阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
